room.description: A small dimly lit room. There is a [knob] on the wall next to the single door.

great-hall.name: Great Hall
great-hall.description: An expansive main room with a huge [table] in the middle surrounded by chairs. There is a large [chair] at the head of the table.

throne-room.name: Throne Room
throne-room.description: A grand room with a majestic [throne] on a raised platform on one end with a [curtain] behind it. There is a skeleton with a [crown] on its lap on the throne. The floor is lined with a [grand rug:grand-rug].

bedroom.name: Bedroom
bedroom.description: A lavish royal bedchamber. The curtained [bed] sits in the middle of the room. A massive gilded [wardrobe] sits against one wall.

bathroom.name: Bathroom
bathroom.description: An elegant bathroom with a gilded [toilet], [sink], and [tub].

courtyard.name: Courtyard
courtyard.description: A beautifully planted yard with a [fountain] in the middle and a [hedge maze:hedges].

interior.name: Wooden Shack
interior.description: A worn-down room with a [cauldron] in the center. [Dried herbs:dried-herbs] hang from the ceiling. One wall is entirely [bookshelves].

yard.name: Yard
yard.description: A small outdoor space enclosed by fences. There is a [garden] in one half and the embers of a [bonfire].

forest.name: Forest
forest.description: An old forest with huge trees and deep [undergrowth].

square.name: Village Square
square.description: A central area of a village that is very empty. There is a large [statue] in the center with a [mule] hitched to it.

food-stall.name: Food Stall
food-stall.description: A wooden stall that advertises food for sale. A group of [crows] surrounds it.

blacksmith.name: Blacksmith
blacksmith.description: A clearly well used smithy. Tools have been left around on the [workbench], there appear to still be some coals alive in the [furnace].

curtain.name: Curtain
curtain.description: A heavy red velvet curtain hanging on the wall.

action.pull: You pull the curtain aside and reveal a door with a ring shaped indentation in the center.

knob.name: Knob
knob.description: A small triangular knob on the wall next to the only door.

fountain.name: Fountain
fountain.description: A large fountain with a statue of a mermaid in the center. The water is not running.

action.turn on: You turn on the fountain and the water begins to flow.

bed.name: Bed
bed.description: A large ornate bed with a canopy. The curtains are drawn around it.

action.nap: You settle into the bed for a rest.

toilet.name: Toilet
toilet.description: An elegant gilded toilet. It is empty and dry.

action.flush: You flush the toilet and the water swirls around.

sink.name: Sink
sink.description: An elegant gilded sink. It is empty and dry.

action.turn on: You turn on the sink and the water begins to flow.

furnace.name: Furnace
furnace.description: A large stone furnace with glowing embers inside.

action.light: You light the furnace and the flames roar to life.

wardrobe.name: Wardrobe
wardrobe.description: A large ornate wardrobe with two doors. It looks like it could fit a person inside.

action.open: You open the wardrobe and see a a key ring hanging from a hook inside.

chair.name: Chair
chair.description: A wooden chair like the many others around the table. There is a cushion on the seat.

action.use: As you sit, you see a jewel peeking out from under the cushion.

table.name: Huge Table
table.description: A huge table with the remnants of a feast, with carrots, bread, and a jug

grand-rug.name: Grand Rug
grand-rug.description: A large ornate rug with a beautiful pattern. It looks like it could be hiding something underneath.

action.search: You search under the rug and find a jewel.

throne.name: Throne
throne.description: A majestic throne with intricate carvings. It has a jeweled drawer under the seat.

action.open drawer: You open the drawer under the throne and find a jewel.

tub.name: Tub
tub.description: An elegant gilded tub. It is empty and dry.

action.turn on: It takes a moment for the water to start flowing, but eventually it spurts out, with a jewel in the stream.

hedge.name: Hedge
hedge.description: A tall hedge in the middle of the maze. It looks like it could be hiding something.

action.search: You search around the hedge and find a jewel.

dried-herbs.name: Dried Herbs
dried-herbs.description: A bundle of dried herbs hanging from the ceiling.

bookshelves.name: Bookshelves
bookshelves.description: A wall of bookshelves filled with dusty old tomes.

bonfire.name: Bonfire
bonfire.description: The embers of a bonfire, it has a straw doll lying in the ashes.

garden.name: Garden
garden.description: A small garden bed with a few flowers and vegetables growing in it.

undergrowth.name: Undergrowth
undergrowth.description: A rotted log with mushrooms growing on it lies in the undergrowth. A group of toads peers up at you from beside it.

workbench.name: Workbench
workbench.description: A well-used workbench with various old tools and creations scattered on top.

blue-jewel.name: Blue Jewel
blue-jewel.description: A small beautiful round blue jewel

green-jewel.name: Green Jewel
green-jewel.description: A small beautiful square green jewel

yellow-jewel.name: Yellow Jewel
yellow-jewel.description: A small beautiful round yellow jewel

purple-jewel.name: Purple Jewel
purple-jewel.description: A small beautiful square purple jewel

courtyard-key.name: Key
courtyard-key.description: A small brass key with a flower engraved on it.

carrot.name: Carrot
carrot.description: An old carrot, but it still looks edible.

jug.name: Jug
jug.description: An old ceramic jug. It contains some kind of orange juice..

mandrake-root.name: Mandrake Root
mandrake-root.description: A gnarled root that looks like a person.

blackthorn.name: Blackthorn
blackthorn.description: A sharp dried branch with thorns.

belladonna.name: Belladonna
belladonna.description: A small bunch of belladonna flowers.

ring-production-book.name: Ring Production Book
ring-production-book.description: The first page of the book reads 'To produce a ring portion, combine blackthorn, mushroom, orange juice, and ashes in a cauldron, then stir.'

how-to-fly-book.name: How To Fly Book
how-to-fly-book.description: The first page of the book reads 'To create a flying potion, combine belladonna, sunflower, a toad, and some fresh water in a cauldron, then stir.'

mind-control-book.name: Mind Control Book
mind-control-book.description: The first page of the book reads 'To control someone's mind, put a feather, a straw doll, mandrake root, and something of theirs in a cauldron, then stir.'

straw-doll.name: Straw Doll
straw-doll.description: A small doll made of straw.

barley.name: Barley
barley.description: A stalk of barley with a grain head.

toad.name: Toad
toad.description: A small brown toad with bumpy skin.

mushroom.name: Mushroom
mushroom.description: A small white mushroom with a round cap.

note.name: Note
note.description: A small note titled 'How to care for your mule'. It reads 'To care for your mule, feed it carrots and barley and give it horseshoes to wear. Then, release it to be free'

old-sword.name: Old Sword
old-sword.description: A rusty old sword. It doesn't look like it would be very effective in combat, but the edge does seem to be sharp.

horseshoes.name: Horseshoes
horseshoes.description: A set of old horseshoes. Amazingly, they seem to be in perfect condition.

harness.name: Harness
harness.description: The end of the rope that the mule was hitched to the statue by.

ring-portion-castle.name: Broken piece of ring
ring-portion-castle.description: A broken piece of ring made out of gold.

ring-portion-shack.name: Broken piece of ring
ring-portion-shack.description: A broken piece of ring made out of silver

ring-portion-village.name: Broken piece of ring
ring-portion-village.description: A broken piece of ring made out of bronze

crown.name: Crown
crown.description: A golden crown with several obviously missing jewels.

interact.blue-jewel: You place the blue jewel in the crown, and it fits perfectly.
interact.green-jewel: The green jewel fits perfectly into one of the empty spots in the crown.
interact.yellow-jewel: You line the yellow jewel up with one of the empty spaces, and it fits in.
interact.red-jewel: The red jewel fills the large center space in the crown perfectly.
interact.purple-jewel: The purple jewel clicks neatly into the crown.

full.newDescription: The crown is now complete with all jewels in place. It shines brightly.

place-on-skeleton's-head.message: You place the crown on the skeleton's head, and it glows. The skeleton's hand uncurls, revealing what appears to be a piece of broken ring.

missing-blue-jewel.newDescription: The crown is missing one final jewel. It looks incomplete.

missing-green-jewel.newDescription: The crown is missing one final jewel. It looks incomplete.

missing-yellow-jewel.newDescription: The crown is missing one final jewel. It looks incomplete.

missing-red-jewel.newDescription: The crown is missing one final jewel. It looks incomplete.

missing-purple-jewel.newDescription: The crown is missing one final jewel. It looks incomplete.

crows.name: Crows
crows.description: A group of crows are surrounding something on the surface of the food stall.

action.shoo: You shoo the crows away, and they come right back before you can get close

interact.bread: You throw a piece of bread on the ground, and the crows swarm it

full.newDescription: The crows are happily pecking at the bread. There is a note revealed on the counter, with a feather left next to it.

interact.blackthorn: You add the blackthorn to the cauldron.
interact.mushroom: You add the mushroom to the cauldron.
interact.jug: You pour the orange juice from the jug into the cauldron.
interact.ashes: You add the ashes to the cauldron.
interact.belladonna: You add the belladonna to the cauldron.
interact.sunflower: You add the sunflower to the cauldron.
interact.toad: You add the toad to the cauldron.
interact.feather: You add the feather to the cauldron.
interact.mandrake-root: You add the mandrake root to the cauldron,
interact.straw-doll: You add the straw doll to the cauldron.

full.newDescription: The cauldron is now full. You give the contents a stir, and they bubble and a piece of broken ring floats to the top.

fly-potion.newDescription: The cauldron is full. Unfortunately, there is no way for you to add water.

mind-potion.newDescription: The cauldron is full. Unfortunately, there is no way for you to add something belonging to another person you're trying to control.

mule.name: Mule
mule.description: A mule is hitched to the statue in the center of the square. It looks hungry.

interact.carrot: You feed the mule a carrot, and it happily munches on it.
interact.barley: You feed the mule some barley, and it happily munches on it.
interact.horseshoes: You give the horseshoes to the mule, and it seems to appreciate them.
interact.harness: You give the other end of the rope to the mule, so it is now free

fed.newDescription: The mule is happily munching on the carrot and barley, and seems to really like the horseshoes. You decide to release it to be free.

statue.name: Statue
statue.description: A large statue of a heroic figure. The empty hand is held out as if it is holding a sword.

interact.old-sword: You place the old sword in the statue's hand, and it fits perfectly.

sword.newDescription: The statue now brandishes a sword, and the horse's harness has been released from it.

secret-door.name: Secret Door
secret-door.description: A hidden door revealed from behind the curtain. It is locked, but has a ring-shaped indentation in the center.

interact.ring-portion-castle: You place the piece of ring from the castle in the indentation, and it fits perfectly. The door unlocks and opens to reveal a hidden room.
interact.ring-portion-shack: You place the piece of ring from the shack in the indentation, but it doesn't fit.
interact.ring-portion-village: You place the piece of ring from the village in the indentation, but it doesn't fit.

unlocked.newDescription: The secret door is now unlocked and open, revealing a hidden room.

locked-door.name: Locked Door
locked-door.description: A locked door that leads north from the great hall. It has a keyhole in the center.

interact.courtyard-key: You insert the key into the keyhole and turn it. You hear a satisfying click as the door unlocks.

unlocked.newDescription: The locked door is now unlocked, revealing an exit to the north.
